name: Galactic Vibes
short_description: Blast through waves of enemies, collect powerups and test your skills against challenging bosses. It is a modern take on classic space shooters, blending accessible gameplay with roguelite progression. Compete for the top spot on the global leaderboards in 15 minute runs.
detailed_description: Galactic Vibes is a blend of classic arcade space shooters and modern roguelite design. Pilot your ship through vibrant, retro-inspired levels, battling waves of enemy space ships and collecting powerful powerups that alter your playstyle. From rapid fire lasers to devastating void balls each powerup offers a fresh strategic advantage. Face challenging bosses with unique attack patterns. After each run permanently upgrade your ship to unlock new possibilities. Compete for the top spot on the global leaderboards and experience the thrill of short, addictive, high-score driven runs.
